results.title: An agentic system for rare disease diagnosis with traceable reasoning.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 41708847. 2026/03/01 00:00. Rare diseases affect more than 300 million people worldwide, yet timely and 
accurate diagnosis remains an urgent challenge1,. Patients often endure a 
prolonged 'diagnostic odyssey' exceeding 5 years, marked by repeated referrals, 
misdiagnoses and unnecessary interventions, leading to delayed treatment and 
substantial emotional and economic burden. Here we present DeepRare-a 
multi-agent system for rare disease differential diagnosis decision support 
po
